## Description
This project purpose is to teach us how to efficiently use threads, and how mutexes work in C language. Threads are important tools, and knowing how to best use them is a great asset to every developer's toolkit
Link to the subject [here](https://cdn.intra.42.fr/pdf/pdf/68946/en.subject.pdf)

## Tests
My project was tested using some mains created by me, and using the subjects examples
